params.name: Tengu Feather Fan
params.description:
On Mar 13, 634 AD, a Tengu was spotted soaring through the sky and caught the attention of humans.
The Tengu is a legendary creature from Japanese folklore, depicted as having huge wings, a red face, and a long nose. It carries a fan that possesses incredible magical powers beyond human imagination. This fan can summon powerful storms and even temporarily influence the climate of its surroundings.
